title: White Devils
overview: When the executor of a will comes to investigate why a once prosperous South African homestead has turned to rack and ruin, he uncovers a dark secret buried in the evils of Apartheid putting his own life in peril.

trailers.title: WHITE DEVILS - Trailer              Film Directed by Gabriel Bologna, Screenplay by Damon Shalit
